description: Lt. Commander Ricksaw's comically laissez-faire attitude toward heavy combat keeps his SEAL team calm and deadly in the most dire situations. Having lead more special ops than any other SEAL to date, Ricksaw knows life is short, and encourages his team to make the most of the time they have—including cheerfully serving up bullets and frag grenades to high- value targets at any and all occasions. Hotdogs, hellcats and hand grenades. Hooya!
name: Lt. Commander Ricksaw | NSWC SEAL
